key_components: imeta-builder: NIP-94 imeta tag construction with local-blob placeholders
buildMediaJson: Serializes attachment metadata + imeta tags for media_json column
sendMessage: Extended to accept optional attachments parameter
enqueueOutgoingMessage: Populates media_json and message_media junction table
canSend: Updated to allow sending with attachments only (no text required)
handleSend: Maps attachment metadata and clears attachments on success

AC-005.evidence: handleSend passes attachments to onSend; clearAttachments called after success; canSend allows text+attachments
AC-005.test_coverage: service.test.ts: attachment-only message test, text-only message test

AC-012.evidence: buildImetaTag produces url local-blob:<sha256> placeholder; enqueueOutgoingMessage populates media_json
AC-012.test_coverage: imeta-builder.test.ts + service.test.ts integration test verifying placeholder in DB

AC-013.evidence: buildImetaTag produces imeta tags with url, m, size, dim, blurhash, sha256 fields per NIP-94
AC-013.test_coverage: imeta-builder.test.ts: complete field coverage + service.test.ts integration

AC-014.evidence: buildImetaTags preserves attachment order; property test verifies ordering across permutations
AC-014.test_coverage: imeta-builder.test.ts ordering + service.test.ts verifies 3-attachment order in DB

VQ-06-INT.detail: No integration test validates the complete sendMessage → database workflow with attachments

fixes.fix: Added 4 integration tests in service.test.ts: full attachment pipeline with media_json + message_media verification, attachment-only send, empty message rejection, text-only message media_json null check
